    Description

    The default SQL template that is optimized for JPA.

    The default SQL template that is optimized for prepared statements.
    Methods in st.orm.core.template that return SqlTemplate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withColumnNameResolver(ColumnNameResolver resolver)
    Returns a new SQL template with the specified column name resolver.
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withConfig(StormConfig config)
    Returns a new SQL template with the specified Storm configuration.
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withDialect(SqlDialect dialect)
    Returns a new SQL template with the specified SQL dialect.
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withForeignKeyResolver(ForeignKeyResolver resolver)
    Returns a new SQL template with the specified foreign key resolver.
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withInlineParameters(boolean inlineParameters)
    Returns a new SQL template instance configured to inline parameters directly into the SQL string, rather than using bind variables.
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withSupportRecords(boolean supportRecords)
    Returns a new SQL template with support for records enabled or disabled.
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withTableAliasResolver(TableAliasResolver resolver)
    Returns a new SQL template with the specified table alias resolver.
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withTableNameResolver(TableNameResolver resolver)
    Returns a new SQL template with the specified table name resolver.
    Method parameters in st.orm.core.template with type arguments of type SqlTemplate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    SqlInterceptor.intercept(UnaryOperator<SqlTemplate> customizer, UnaryOperator<Sql> interceptor, Runnable runnable)
    Executes a Runnable action within the context of an SQL interceptor, which modifies SQL statements.
    static <T> T
    SqlInterceptor.intercept(UnaryOperator<SqlTemplate> customizer, UnaryOperator<Sql> interceptor, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Executes a Supplier within the context of an SQL interceptor, returning its result.
    static <T> T
    SqlInterceptor.interceptThrowing(UnaryOperator<SqlTemplate> customizer, UnaryOperator<Sql> interceptor, Callable<T> callable)
    Executes a Callable action within the context of an SQL interceptor, returning its result and potentially throwing exceptions.
    static void
    SqlInterceptor.observe(UnaryOperator<SqlTemplate> customizer, Consumer<Sql> observer, Runnable runnable)
    Executes a Runnable action within the context of an SQL observer, which consumes SQL statements.
    static <T> T
    SqlInterceptor.observe(UnaryOperator<SqlTemplate> customizer, Consumer<Sql> observer, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Executes a Supplier within the context of an SQL observer, returning its result.
    static <T> T
    SqlInterceptor.observeThrowing(UnaryOperator<SqlTemplate> customizer, Consumer<Sql> observer, Callable<T> callable)
    Executes a Callable action within the context of an SQL observer, returning its result and potentially throwing exceptions.

    Method parameters in st.orm.core.template.impl with type arguments of type SqlTemplate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static SqlInterceptorManager.Carrier
    SqlInterceptorManager.intercept(UnaryOperator<SqlTemplate> customizer, Consumer<Sql> observer)
    Create a new scoped interceptor that applies an operator to SQL statements processed by the current thread and any child threads.
    static SqlInterceptorManager.Carrier
    SqlInterceptorManager.intercept(UnaryOperator<SqlTemplate> customizer, UnaryOperator<Sql> operator)
    Create a new scoped interceptor that applies an operator to SQL statements processed by the current thread and any child threads.
